meta.title: Modular Container Cabins & Dry Fabricated Units | Crystal Group
meta.description: Custom container cabins for site offices, dormitories, security booths, cafes, and more. Delivered ready in 7–15 days. Save up to 40% vs conventional construction.

hero.name: Modular Container Cabins
hero.tagline: Custom-built container spaces delivered in 7–15 days. Site offices, dormitories, cafes, security cabins — any configuration.

overview: Crystal Group's dry fabricated units are custom-built from repurposed shipping containers — portable, durable spaces with insulation, ventilation, electrical fittings, and optional plumbing. Save up to 40% versus conventional construction. Available as site offices, dormitories, container cafes, security cabins, medical rooms, and more. Move via forklift or crane — no permanent foundation required.

features.title: Site Office
features.desc: Fully furnished portable offices for construction sites, project HQs, and remote operations. Pre-fitted with electrics, AC, and lighting.

features.title: Dormitory
features.desc: Multi-bunk accommodation units for site workers. Insulated, ventilated, and fitted with electrical points and lighting.

features.title: Security Cabin
features.desc: Compact security booths for entry points and checkposts. Weatherproof, with window panel, lock, and electrical fitting.

features.title: Container Cafe
features.desc: Pop-up cafe and food kiosk conversions. 20 ft G+1 configuration available. Custom branding and interior fit-out.

features.title: Medical Room
features.desc: Hygienic medical-grade container rooms for site healthcare facilities. Easy to clean, ventilated, and compliant layouts.

features.title: Custom Cabin
features.desc: Baby creche, smoking rooms, toilet blocks, or any bespoke requirement. Tell us your use case and we design it.

faq.q: How long does fabrication and delivery take?
faq.a: Most units are ready in 7–15 days from order confirmation, depending on customisation complexity.

faq.q: Does it need a permanent foundation?
faq.a: No permanent foundation is required. A level concrete or RCC surface is sufficient. Units can be relocated via forklift or crane.

faq.q: Can the exterior and interior be branded?
faq.a: Yes. Custom paint colours, vinyl wraps, signage, and interior branding are all available.
All units come with electrical wiring and LED lighting. Plumbing can be added as an optional fitment.
Yes. G+1 (two-storey) configurations are available for container cafes and offices where height permits.
